changes.value:
## What

Implement the READY virtual tag strategy. A task is READY when all its dependencies are complete (in the terminal column) or it has no dependencies at all.

**Files to modify:**
- `swissarmyhammer-kanban/src/virtual_tags.rs` â€” add `ReadyStrategy` struct implementing `VirtualTagStrategy`:
  - `slug()` â†’ `\"READY\"`
  - `color()` â†’ `\"0e8a16\"` (green â€” signals go)
  - `description()` â†’ `\"Task has no unmet dependencies\"`
  - `matches()` â†’ reuse logic from `task_is_ready()` in task_helpers.rs (check all deps are in terminal column)
- `swissarmyhammer-kanban/src/virtual_tags.rs` â€” register in `default_virtual_tag_registry()`

Note: tasks in the done/terminal column should NOT get READY (it's meaningless for completed tasks).

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] `ReadyStrategy` implements `VirtualTagStrategy`
- [ ] Task with no deps â†’ has READY tag
- [ ] Task with all deps complete â†’ has READY tag
- [ ] Task with unmet deps â†’ does NOT have READY tag
- [ ] Task in terminal column â†’ does NOT have READY tag
- [ ] Registered in default registry

## Tests
- [ ] Unit test: task with no deps matches READY
- [ ] Unit test: task with completed deps matches READY
- [ ] Unit test: task with incomplete dep does not match READY
- [ ] Unit test: completed task does not match READY
- [ ] `cargo nextest run -p swissarmyhammer-kanban` passes

## Workflow
- Use `/tdd` â€” write failing tests first, then implement to make them pass.
